note: Routing + behavior catalog for Ultrapower. 'should_trigger' = Ultrapower/router should engage; 'expect_intent' = which specialist behavior should result; 'must_not' = behavior that would be a defect; 'assert' = observable facts the executable runner checks (file contents, exit status, working-tree, stream events). The executable behavioral suite lives in evals/run.sh (real `claude -p --plugin-dir` sessions): scenario ids tagged [det] assert hard facts; [beh] depend on model judgement. The 'regression-explore-no-leak' case is the permanent guard for the explore->implement/document tool-restriction leak.

cases.prompt: fix the off-by-one in the pagination helper
explain how authentication works across this project
review the current diff for unnecessary complexity
write deployment documentation from the actual repository
is this requested refactor necessary?
continue the active task
investigate why the event is duplicated, fix it, and document it
explain the general concept of JavaScript closures
translate 'the cat is on the mat' to French
what is the git command to amend the last commit message?
what calls loginUser?
make sum() add instead of subtract
draft (in chat) a short module overview for src/auth.js
update the README with a usage section
plan how to add rate limiting (planning only)
review the diff and fix what you find
what's the status of the current work?
resume the previous Ultrapower task
expect: says no resumable task when none persisted

cases.prompt: fix the typo in the banner (note: repo has unrelated uncommitted edits)
fix the obvious bug in add()
rename this variable (file has a valuable invariant comment)
make the listUsers response more convenient for the frontend
expect: do not edit before the answer
must_not: guess and silently change the contract

cases.prompt: change listUsers to return an object keyed by id (explicit, fully specified) and verify
must_not: block the explicit request on a confirmation question

cases.prompt: rename a private local helper for clarity
trace callers of loginUser (no CodeGraph available)
find the blast radius of changing loginUser
expect: use a narrower tool (impact/callers) only if it is actually exposed this session
must_not: call a CLI named 'codegraph search' (the CLI subcommand is 'codegraph query')

cases.prompt: investigate the failing test with the explore specialist, then fix it and verify
assert: sum.js file content changed to 'a + b'
must_not: print the fix without applying it
claim completion while the test is still red

cases.prompt: investigate with explore, then document it
investigate with explore, fix, then document
fix only the sum bug (repo has unrelated modified, staged, untracked files and a pre-existing edit in the target)
what is the status of the current work?
resume the previous Ultrapower task
expect: honest 'no resumable task' when none persisted
must_not: infer a task from the dirty tree or commits

cases.prompt: review the sum.js bug, then fix it
assert: no tool denied after review (fork did not leak)

cases.prompt: resume the active task (active.md is on a different branch)
session1: fix add() and persist that mul() remains; session2: resume and finish
resume a task whose recorded verification FAILED; use a different approach
assert: resumed session does not repeat the recorded failed approach

cases.prompt: rename a function in a file that has a valuable invariant comment
change clamp() from cap-100 to cap-200
assert: the now-inaccurate '100' comment is corrected or removed

cases.prompt: implement poll() whose 1100ms delay is required by an upstream rate limiter
expect: a why-comment explaining the constraint, not what the code does

cases.prompt: fix the obvious sum() bug
assert: no comment mentions Claude/AI/Ultrapower/prompt/history/'updated logic' or narrates obvious control flow
